name: @amadeni/convex-lib
description: Reusable Convex library primitives, errors, and Zod helpers

scripts.ci: pnpm run prettier:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run ts && pnpm run check-spelling && pnpm run test
scripts.release: pnpm version patch && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: pnpm version minor && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: pnpm version major && git push && git push --tags
scripts.re-release: git tag -d v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git push origin :refs/tags/v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git push --tags

author: Amadeni <nicolai.hallberg@amadeni.ai>
